---
title: "STM Workflow for Social Media Text Analysis"
output: html_document
---

## Setup

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
library(quanteda)
library(stm)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
```

## Load sample data

```{r}
df <- read_csv(here::here("data", "sample", "sample_posts.csv"))
head(df)
```

## Clean text

```{r}
clean_text <- function(text) {
  text <- tolower(text)
  text <- gsub("http\\S+|www\\S+", "", text)
  text <- gsub("@\\w+", "", text)
  text <- gsub("#", "", text)
  text <- gsub("[^a-z\\s]", " ", text)
  text <- gsub("\\s+", " ", text)
  trimws(text)
}

df$clean_text <- sapply(df$text, clean_text)
```

## Build corpus and DFM

```{r}
corp <- corpus(df, text_field = "clean_text", docid_field = "id")
toks <- tokens(corp, remove_punct = TRUE, remove_numbers = TRUE) %>%
  tokens_remove(stopwords("en")) %>%
  tokens_wordstem()

dfmat <- dfm(toks)
stm_input <- convert(dfmat, to = "stm")
```

## Fit STM model

```{r}
k <- 5
stm_model <- stm(
  documents = stm_input$documents,
  vocab = stm_input$vocab,
  K = k,
  data = stm_input$meta,
  init.type = "Spectral"
)

labelTopics(stm_model)
```

## Plot topic prevalence

```{r}
plot(stm_model, type = "summary")
```
